sections.heading: Latest Partnerships
sections.text: Latest Partnerships 3D Printing Bolsters Innovation for Global Manufacturer Rapid iteration capabilities and solid quality helped Nordson Adhesives quickly get their part. Learn More NASA NASA partners with Protolabs to machine a crowdsourced, generatively designed part that was delivered in only 36 hours so the design could be presented at the PowerSource Global Summit. The cookies that are classified as "Necessary" are stored on your browser as they are essential for enabling the basic functionalities of the site.... Show more Necessary Always Active Necessary cookies are required to enable the basic features of this site, such as providing secure log-in or adjusting your consent preferences. These cookies do not store any personally identifiable data. Cookie _dd_s Duration 1 year Description Datadog cookie used to group all events generated from a unique user session across multiple pages.
